Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly requires students to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright), which supports the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops 'Abilities of global mobility,' an essential enabler for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
